package rulefixtures

import (
	"os/exec"
)

// scenario for os_exec_command_with_user_input: `exec.Command(userInput)` or `exec.Command("sh", "-c", variable)` where the command string appears to come from a function parameter or request binding
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: error.
func scenario726Negative() error {
	return exec.Command("/usr/bin/uptime").Run()
}
